Coverage.period.name: Medicare Coverage Start Date
Coverage.period.description: That date that Medicare Coverage began for the Beneficiary.

Coverage.period.name: Medicare Coverage A Start Date
Coverage.period.description: That date that Medicare Coverage Part A started for the Beneficiary.

Coverage.period.name: Medicare Coverage A End Date
Coverage.period.description: That date that Medicare Coverage Part A ended for the Beneficiary.

Coverage.extension.name: Part D Segment Number - January
Coverage.extension.description: This variable is the segment number that CMS assigns to identify a geographic market segment or subdivision of a Part D plan; the segment number allows you to determine the market area covered by the plan. The variable describes the market segment for a given month (January through December).
additional: coverage.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

Coverage.extension.name: Part D Low Income Cost Share Group Code - January
Coverage.extension.description: This variable indicates the beneficiary’s Part D low-income subsidy cost sharing group for a given month (January). The Part D benefit requires enrollees to pay both premiums and cost-sharing, but the program also has a low-income subsidy (LIS) that covers some or all of those costs for certain lowincome individuals, including deductibles and cost-sharing during the coverage gap.
additional: coverage.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

Coverage.extension.name: Medicare Status Code
Coverage.extension.description: This variable indicates how a beneficiary currently qualifies for Medicare.
additional: coverage.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

Coverage.beneficiary.name: Beneficiary Id
Coverage.beneficiary.description: The unique CCW identifier for a beneficiary. The CCW assigns a unique beneficiary identification number to each individual who receives Medicare and/or Medicaid and uses that number to identify an individual’s records in all CCW data files. This number does not change during a beneficiary’s lifetime, and CCW uses each number only once. The BENE_ID is specific to the CCW and is not applicable to any other identification system or data source.

Coverage.id.name: Coverage Resource ID
Coverage.id.description: Each resource has an id element which contains the 'logical id' of the resource assigned by the server responsible for storing it.

Coverage.subscriberId.name: Medicare Beneficiary Identifier
Coverage.subscriberId.description: A Medicare Beneficiary Identifier (MBI) assigned to a beneficiary.

Coverage.meta.name: Coverage Resource Last Updated Date
Coverage.meta.description: The date that this record was last updated within the database.

Coverage.meta.name: Coverage Resource Profile
Coverage.meta.description: An assertion that the content within the FHIR resource response conforms to a FHIR resource profile defined by HL7 or other FHIR Accelerator Groups. The industry standard profile that is used as a template for this FHIR Resource.

Coverage.status.name: Part B Termination Code
Coverage.status.description: This code specifies the reason Part B entitlement was terminated.
additional: coverage.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

Coverage.status.name: Part A Termination Code
Coverage.status.description: This code specifies the reason Part A entitlement was terminated.
additional: coverage.extension[N].valueCoding.display = {corresponding description from valueset specified in .system}

Coverage.payor.name: Coverage Payor
Coverage.payor.description: The program or plan underwriter or payor including both insurance and non-insurance agreements, such as patient-pay agreements.

Coverage.class.value.name: Coverage Class - Group
Coverage.class.value.description: The type of classification for which an insurer-specific class label or number and optional name is provided, for example may be used to identify a class of coverage or employer group, Policy, Plan.

Coverage.class.value.name: Coverage Class - Plan
Coverage.class.value.description: The type of classification for which an insurer-specific class label or number and optional name is provided, for example may be used to identify a class of coverage or employer group, Policy, Plan.

Coverage.type.name: Coverage Type
Coverage.type.description: The type of coverage: social program, medical plan, accident coverage (workers compensation, auto), group health or payment by an individual or organization.
